requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the official
website of the RBI.
requirements.object: the day they are placed on the official website of the RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').

of the bank which are located abroad, to the extent they are not contradictory to the
local laws in the host country, provided that:
(1) where applicable laws and regulations prohibit implementation of these guidelines,
the bank shall bring the same to the notice of the RBI.
requirements.object: branches and majority-owned subsidiaries of the bank which are located abroad, to the extent they are not contradictory to the local laws in the host country

requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure for communication of compliance of action taken under Section
12A: The CNO and the Nodal Officer in the Foreigners Division, MHA shall furnish the
details of funds, financial assets or economic resources or related services of
designated individuals/entities, frozen by an order, and details of the individuals whose
entry into India or transit through India was prevented, respectively, to the Ministry of
External Affairs, for onward communication to the United Nations.
